feed.title: Google Cloud: Data Studio
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Data Studio

entry.content:
Viewer data refresh

Report editors can now allow report viewers to manually refresh report data. When editors enable the new Viewer data refresh option in report settings, viewers can refresh data for a component by right clicking the component, or refresh data for a report by selecting the option in the three-dot menu.
entry.summary: Report editors can now enable viewers to manually refresh report data. Viewers can refresh individual components or the entire report through simple right-click or menu options.
entry.title: Feature: Viewer data refresh

entry.content:
Pro feature: Security and compliance enhancements

The following features are now available to help you meet your organization's security and compliance needs. These features are only available for Data Studio Pro.

  • Customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK): Use your own cryptographic keys to protect Data Studio Pro assets.
  • Customer-managed storage: Store your file uploads in your own Cloud Storage bucket and your data extracts in your own BigQuery dataset.
  • Data residency: Keep your data physically within a geographical area.
entry.summary: Data Studio Pro now offers advanced security and compliance features, including customer-managed encryption keys, customer-managed storage options, and data residency controls. These enhancements empower organizations to better protect their data and meet regulatory requirements.
entry.title: Feature: New security and compliance features for Data Studio Pro

entry.content:
Regionalization in CA in Data Studio

Conversational Analytics in Data Studio now supports multi-region BigQuery data agents.

Learn more about Conversational Analytics in Data Studio.
entry.summary: Conversational Analytics in Data Studio now works with BigQuery data sources across multiple regions. This update enhances flexibility for users working with geographically distributed data. Learn more about this new capability.
entry.title: Feature: Regional BigQuery support for Conversational Analytics
